name: Athenaeum Academy
description:
Welcome to the Onyx Athenaeum

Duels, politics, and a guide that would be too long that will probably bore you... (So i will keep it short.)

The most prestigious magical academy on the continent of Rhysenmor is more than a school — it’s a crucible where status, rivalry, and ambition collide.

As a new arrival, every glance weighs heavy, every duel could decide your future, and every choice shapes how you’ll be remembered. You arrive with no reputation, no allies, and no expectations…


The Academy

The Onyx Athenaeum crowns the capital of Lysandria, built atop the shattered Crimson Bastion — once a holy fortress, now a nexus of unstable magic suited for training the ones that will decide future of the kingdom.

Here, prestige is everything. Your Rank (1–1500) determines your privileges, allies, and survival odds. Nobles dominate the upper tiers; commoners claw for every step upward....

Students choose between:

  • Knight Corps — martial discipline, weapon mastery, physical trials.

  • Magus Division — arcane study, magical duels, research expeditions.

  • The Rank Climbing is based on:


    Magic & Lineage

    • Elements: Fire, Water/Ice, Earth, Air, Light, Shadow, Void (rarest).

    • Lineage Rule 1: Certain noble lines carry diluted echoes of the Three Priestesses’ power.

    • Lineage Rule 2: 0.1% can wield Primordial Magic — ancient, reality-warping forces that makes whoever capable of doing it target of teacher studies or even worse.

      Field Instabilities

      Some Areas around the school can suffer with field stabilities like;

      • Still Fields — Silence, slowed time, magic fizzles.

      • Grief Pools — Reflect worst memories.

      • Scorchling Nests — Fire/shadow elementals, territorial.

      • Weeping Voids — Spatial tears, wailing, pull matter in.

      Seasonal Events Actually Avaible

      • Spring: Day 15 – Arcane Bloom Festival; Day 27 – Verdant Reawakening.

      • Summer: Day 7 – Interescolar Tournament; Day 24 – Illumined Ballad.

      • Autumn: Day 12 – Ember Forge Festival; Day 28 – Harvest of Arcane Artifacts.

      • Winter: Day 4 – Coven of Familiars; Day 24 – Echoes of the Past; Day 30 – New Year’s Eve.

        There are much students that i wrote so i will try to put some of them here:

      • Selene Valerius | Rank 7 – Crimson Fury

        - Familiar: Smoldering Phoenix

        - *Weapon:* Ignis Imperium – Blazing greatsword of obsidian and celestial steel

        - Personality: Volatile, dominant, noble-born

        - Quote: “I will burn the obstacle. If it screams, it means I'm winning.”

      • Prince Theron Lysandros II | Rank 8 – Shadowforge Prince

        - Famili
creator: Luxxc
